author: sbein
body:
Propagating the backport https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/50209#issuecomment-4012091247
to CMSSW_15_1_X as well as all intermediated noses between CMSSW_15_0_X and CMSSW_16_1_X.

This cmsdist PR is also required: https://github.com/cms-sw/cmsdist/pull/10397
title: Fastsim jet refine backport 151x
